query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS succession_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  previous_holder_id INT NOT NULL,
  new_holder_id INT NOT NULL,
  interim_start_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  interim_end_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'confirmed', 'rejected', 'completed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  completed_at DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_house (house_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS succession_confirmations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  succession_id INT NOT NULL,
  confirmer_id INT NOT NULL,
  confirmer_name VARCHAR(255),
  vote ENUM('approve', 'reject') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  confirmed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_succession (succession_id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (succession_id, confirmer_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS succession_confirmations (

  succession_id INT NOT NULL,

  vote ENUM('approve', 'reject') NOT NULL,
